query:
SELECT 
  g.id,
  g.emailSubject,
  g.emailBody,
  g.parsedData,
  o.orderNo,
  o.courseAmount,
  o.teacherFee
FROM gmailImportLogs g
LEFT JOIN orders o ON g.orderId = o.id
WHERE g.emailBody LIKE '%给嘟嘟200%'
   OR g.emailBody LIKE '%给瑶瑶210%'
LIMIT 1;
